title: PriSKm
description: A Skript addon to add features the older, deprecated plugins had
body:
# PriSKm | Skript Addon
This will add features to Skript that older Skript addons used to have, and even add some other features that no other addon has implemented!

The purpose of PriSKm is to make your Skripting experience just a little bit better by adding syntax that will assist your progression through Skript :3

This adds features like:
 - Block Clipping Condition (Check if a player's hitbox is within the hitbox of a solid block)
- Full QuestCraft/ViveCraft support via VivecraftSpigot (Thank you for helping me, CqllMeToxic)
- Eye Height (Get the eye height of an entity; can change based on various factors)
-  Thunder Change Event (Called when the thunder state of a world changes)
- Maximum Air (Get and set the maximum air for an entity when they're underwater)

All of our syntaxes can be found on the SkriptHub docs!

# Prerequisites
  - Skript (obviously)
  - Paper 1.21+

## Installation
  - Download the latest release from the [latest release page](https://github.com/Pryzmm/PriSKm/releases).
  - Add PriSKm to your server plugins folder.
  - For QuestCraft/ViveCraft support, download [VivecraftSpigot](https://github.com/CJCrafter/VivecraftSpigot/releases). (Optional)
  - Restart your server!

[![SkriptHubViewTheDocs](http://skripthub.net/static/addon/ViewTheDocsButton.png)](http://skripthub.net/docs/?addon=PriSKm)
